TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Plmwan, title = Plmwan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Plmwan} }

S.FORM: alang Plmwan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 36 buwan, 137 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 133 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 93%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Plmwan hya' ga Quri . tay 'llaw na Plmwan hya' ga Tayax. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Plmwan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 36 buwan, 137 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 133 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 93%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Plmwan hya' ga Quri . tay 'llaw na Plmwan hya' ga Tayax. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ plmwan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na plmwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na plmwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na plmwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na plmwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na plmwan ħjaʔ ɣa quri . taj ʔllaw na plmwan ħjaʔ ɣa tajax. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
